ideal.label: Perfect match
ideal.hint: This palette fully fits the selected style.

good.label: Good
good.hint: Stable pairing; the style character is preserved.

experimental.label: Experimental
experimental.hint: Works, but the style will feel unconventional.

interfaceType.title: Interface type
interfaceType.subtitle: 12 directions: from Dark Fantasy to Scholar

background.title: Home page background
background.subtitle: Personalize the start screen
background.imageHelper: Paste a URL or upload a file below
background.dropHint: Drop an image or use the button above

customFonts.title: Custom fonts
customFonts.subtitle: Connect your own font-family and CSS URL
customFonts.cssUrl: Font CSS URL (Google Fonts / your CDN)
customFonts.cssHelper: The link will be injected as <link rel="stylesheet">
customFonts.localHint: For local fonts place files in frontend/public/fonts, then point CSS e.g. /fonts/my-local-font.css and a family like "MyLocalFont", serif. Values switch mode to Custom automatically.

patterns.title: Panel & card patterns
patterns.subtitle: Grid, dots, diagonal, or your texture
patterns.cardSampleDesc: How card backgrounds look with the current pattern.

customThemes.title: Custom themes
customThemes.subtitle: Save and quickly switch your own setups
customThemes.empty: No saved themes yet. Tune the look and press Save.

currentParams.title: Current parameters
currentParams.subtitle: All active settings
currentParams.footerNote: These settings apply across the app and are stored locally in your browser.

tips.palettes: For a strict UI, **Obsidian Gold** and **Midnight Cyan** work best.
tips.lessGlass: Want less “glass”? Switch surface mode to **Solid**.
tips.darkArt: Prefer **dark, low-contrast** art for background images.
tips.busyBg: If the background is too busy, lower opacity to **20–45%**.
tips.cinematic: For a cinematic look, try **blur 10–16** and **transparency 65–78%**.

industrial-condensed.label: Industrial Condensed (Space Grotesk + IBM Plex Sans Condensed)

dark-fantasy.label: Dark Fantasy
dark-fantasy.shortDescription: Dark cinematic style tailored for lore and maps.
dark-fantasy.spotlight: Deep shadows, serif headlines, and a soft gold accent.

high-fantasy.label: High Fantasy
high-fantasy.shortDescription: Brighter epic look with a legendary atmosphere.
high-fantasy.spotlight: Airy panels, soft glows, and expressive typography.

sci-fi.label: Sci-Fi
sci-fi.shortDescription: Clean tech UI for analytics and data.
sci-fi.spotlight: Geometry, crisp edges, and restrained motion.

cyberpunk.label: Cyberpunk
cyberpunk.shortDescription: High contrast, neon, and aggressive accents.
cyberpunk.spotlight: Bright signals, tight grids, and tense visual rhythm.

solarpunk.label: Solarpunk
solarpunk.spotlight: Natural tones, airy grids, and calm dynamics.

steampunk.label: Steampunk
steampunk.shortDescription: Industrial retro aesthetics and tactile textures.
steampunk.spotlight: Brass accents, dense panels, and clear outlines.

noir-detective.label: Noir Detective
noir-detective.shortDescription: Strict dark minimalism focused on content.
noir-detective.spotlight: Near-monochrome, low noise, and firm contrast.

arcane-mystic.label: Arcane Mystic
arcane-mystic.shortDescription: Mystical look with glow and soft gradients.

imperial-chronicle.label: Imperial Chronicle
imperial-chronicle.shortDescription: Formal archival style for an in-world encyclopedia.
imperial-chronicle.spotlight: Readable, neat borders, and steady rhythm.

industrial-brutal.label: Industrial Brutal
industrial-brutal.spotlight: Solid blocks, minimal rounding, and clear hierarchy.

holographic.label: Holographic
holographic.shortDescription: Glass panels with cool shimmer and depth.

scholar-manuscript.label: Scholar Manuscript
scholar-manuscript.shortDescription: Calm document style for reading and notes.
scholar-manuscript.spotlight: Warm tone, moderate contrast, and minimal motion.

preview.title: Preview
preview.sampleBody: An ancient tower hidden among misty cliffs. Inside lie maps, expedition logs, and forgotten treatises on magic.

createDialog.subtitle: Set base colors, check the preview, and save the palette to the list.

accent.title: Accent
accent.description: Color for active buttons and highlights.

text.title: Text
text.description: Primary color for headings and content.

createDialog.previewCardLine: Sample interface card with your palette.
createDialog.previewProjectDesc: Short description and project status in your palette.
createDialog.lowContrast: Low contrast: text may be hard to read.
